description: DB-backed retrieval fixtures that seed real workspace/project/page permissions and run retrieveWithPolicy with deterministic benchmark embeddings.

cases.query: What must RAG do before citations are packed?

notes.label: shared-policy
notes.title: RAG permission policy
notes.contentText: RAG must filter unreadable notes before citations are packed.

notes.label: page-override
notes.title: Restricted page override
notes.contentText: This restricted page mentions citations and should never be visible to the guest.
